page.title: Jet Ski Marbella | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Rent a jet ski in Marbella from €749 for 2 hours. Depart Puerto Banús. Skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks included. Book your jet ski Marbella adventure today.
data.summary: Rent a jet ski in Marbella from Puerto Banús. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3.4m, 3 pax) includes skipper, fuel, drinks & snacks. Perfect for exploring the Costa del Sol coastline.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski: 3.4m, 3 passengers, departs Puerto Banús
From €749 for 2 hours (skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance & IVA included)
Also available: Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749/2h
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava & light snacks
Explore Marbella, Puerto Banús, Cabopino, Estepona & Sotogrande coastline
Best for small groups wanting a fast, open-water experience
Book via WhatsApp for availability & custom durations

faq.q: What is included in a jet ski Marbella charter?
faq.a: Every jet ski charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel.

faq.q: How many people can ride on the jet ski?
faq.a: Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates up to 3 passengers. It measures 3.4m in length, making it ideal for couples or small groups wanting a thrilling ride along the Marbella coastline.

faq.q: Where does the jet ski charter depart from?
faq.a: All jet ski charters depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. We recommend arriving 15 minutes before your scheduled departure time to complete the safety briefing.

faq.q: How much does a jet ski rental in Marbella cost?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski starts at €749 for 2 hours. For longer durations, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

faq.q: Can I drive the jet ski myself?
faq.a: Yes, but a licensed skipper is always on board to ensure safety. You'll receive a full safety briefing before departure. The skipper can also take control if needed.

faq.q: What should I bring for a jet ski trip?
faq.a: Bring swimwear, sunscreen, a towel, and a change of clothes. We provide all drinks and snacks. A waterproof phone pouch is recommended if you want to take photos.

faq.q: Is the jet ski suitable for beginners?
faq.a: Absolutely. The Sea-Doo GTX is user-friendly and stable. Our skipper provides guidance and safety instructions. No prior experience is required.

faq.q: Can I combine a jet ski with a boat charter?
faq.a: Yes. Our Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) include a free jet ski for groups wanting both experiences. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom packages.

data.body_html:
Experience the thrill of riding a jet ski Marbella from Puerto Banús. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3.4m, 3 passengers) is the perfect way to explore the Costa del Sol coastline. From €749 for 2 hours, every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and Spanish IVA. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced rider, this is an unforgettable way to see Marbella from the water.

Why Choose a Jet Ski in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline offers calm Mediterranean waters, stunning views of La Concha mountain, and easy access to exclusive beaches like Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés. A jet ski lets you cover more ground in less time than a traditional boat. You can explore the Golden Mile, cruise past luxury yachts in Puerto Banús, or head towards Cabopino and Estepona. The Sea-Doo GTX is stable and user-friendly, making it ideal for all skill levels.

Our Jet Ski: Sea-Doo GTX

Our fleet includes the Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski (3.4m, 3 pax). It departs from Puerto Banús and is available for charter from €749 for 2 hours. For longer durations, contact us via WhatsApp for pricing. The jet ski is maintained to the highest safety standards and comes with all necessary equipment.

What's Included in Your Charter

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

All prices are inclusive. No hidden fees. Just show up with swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel.

Explore Marbella's Coastline

From Puerto Banús, you can head west towards Estepona and Sotogrande, or east towards Cabopino and Cala del Faro. The water is typically calm from May to October, with average sea temperatures of 22–26°C. The jet ski allows you to stop at secluded coves, take photos, or simply enjoy the speed. Our skipper knows the best spots and will tailor the route to your preferences.

How to Book Your Jet Ski Marbella

Booking is simple. Contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, time, and duration. We'll confirm availability and send you a booking link. Payment is secure. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially during July and August. For groups, consider our Boat Rental Marbella options, including Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749 for 2 hours.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is included in a jet ski Marbella charter?

Every jet ski charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel.

How many people can ride on the jet ski?

Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski accommodates up to 3 passengers. It measures 3.4m in length, making it ideal for couples or small groups wanting a thrilling ride along the Marbella coastline.

Where does the jet ski charter depart from?

All jet ski charters depart from Puerto Banús, the famous marina in Marbella. We recommend arriving 15 minutes before your scheduled departure time to complete the safety briefing.

How much does a jet ski rental in Marbella cost?

The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski starts at €749 for 2 hours. For longer durations, pricing is available on request via WhatsApp. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

Can I drive the jet ski myself?

Yes, but a licensed skipper is always on board to ensure safety. You'll receive a full safety briefing before departure. The skipper can also take control if needed.

What should I bring for a jet ski trip?

Bring swimwear, sunscreen, a towel, and a change of clothes. We provide all drinks and snacks. A waterproof phone pouch is recommended if you want to take photos.

Is the jet ski suitable for beginners?

Absolutely. The Sea-Doo GTX is user-friendly and stable. Our skipper provides guidance and safety instructions. No prior experience is required.

Can I combine a jet ski with a boat charter?

Yes. Our Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) include a free jet ski for groups wanting both experiences. Contact us via WhatsApp for custom packages.
